name: ysclaw-agent4
description: YuanshengClaw Agent4 extension pack for blueprint-driven patch planning, regression verification, and VerifiedPatchPackage handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Blueprint-driven patch planning and verified patch package workflow
interface.longDescription: Use Agent4 to read RootCauseBlueprint inputs, produce PatchPlan outputs, coordinate OpenCode Build patch candidates, normalize Agent1 regression results, and hand off VerifiedPatchPackage artifacts to Agent5.
defaultPrompt: Create a PatchPlan from this RootCauseBlueprint.
Build and verify a patch candidate for Agent5 handoff.
